payload.subject: Re: Reschedule needed
payload.body:
hi — thanks for the heads up.

here are a couple of times that could work for us:

1. monday, june 30 — any time in the morning
2. tuesday, july 1 — afternoon works well

let us know if either of those fits. happy to adjust if needed.

parsed.rationale: No calendar context was provided in the memory slice, so the suggested times are plausible placeholders — a human should confirm actual availability before this reply is sent.
